name: Cute Baby Duckling
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a chubby fluffy baby duckling standing on two little webbed feet, a round soft body with fuzzy down, big happy eyes, a tiny rounded bill, and one small wing lifted in a wave, simple and toddler-friendly

name: Mallard Drake
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a handsome male mallard duck standing in profile, a sleek rounded head, a broad flat bill, a curled feather at the tail, a plump chest, and detailed wing feathers showing along its side

name: Duck Swimming
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a cheerful duck floating on the water, its body resting on gentle ripples, head held high with a content smile, a couple of curved water lines and a small lily pad drifting nearby

name: Duck Family
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a mother duck leading a row of four small ducklings in a line behind her across the grass, the mother looking back over her shoulder, each duckling slightly smaller than the last, warm and caring expressions

name: Duckling in an Egg
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a tiny duckling hatching out of a cracked egg, its fuzzy head and big eyes peeking over the broken shell, little wings poking out, a second smooth egg resting in a small nest of straw beside it

name: Rubber Duck
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a classic round rubber bath duck with a smooth body, a flat wide bill, a small wing shape on each side, a single dot eye, sitting in a little ring of bubbles and water splashes

name: Duck in the Pond
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a duck swimming on a pond surrounded by tall cattails and reeds, a few lily pads with a flower on the water, gentle ripples spreading out from the duck, and a couple of clouds above

name: Flying Duck
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a duck in mid-flight with both wings spread wide and feathers fanned out, neck stretched forward, webbed feet tucked back under its tail, a few small clouds around it in the sky

name: Duckling and Butterfly
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a happy little duckling sitting in the grass looking up at a butterfly fluttering just above its bill, a couple of simple flowers and blades of grass around it, sweet and gentle scene

name: Duck Close-Up Portrait
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a close-up head-and-shoulders portrait of a duck facing forward, a detailed flat bill with nostril marks, large friendly eyes, and rows of small feather lines over the head and neck

name: Mama Duck and Ducklings on Water
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a mother duck swimming on calm water with three small ducklings paddling close behind her in a trail, ripples behind each one, a reed and a lily pad at the edge of the scene

name: Wood Duck
subject: animals/duck
prompt: a fancy wood duck perched on a low branch over the water, a crested head with a long swept-back crest, a patterned face with bold stripes, intricate feather markings along its body and folded wings
